chunks.text:
<!-- image -->

**Nash County Board of Commissioners Recessed / Joint meeting with the Nash County Planning Board 
Wednesday, May 27, 2026, from 4 PM – 6 PM
Nash County Recreation Center
981 Old White Oak Road
Nashville, NC 27856**

1. Call the Board of Commissioners Meeting to Order – Chairman Marvin C. Arrington
2. Call the Planning Board Meeting to Order– Chairman Dee Parker, Jr.
3. Invocation – Chairman Marvin C. Arrington
4. Pledge of Allegiance – Commissioner J. Wayne Outlaw
5. Welcome and Introductions – Chairman Marvin C. Arrington
6. Presentation and Discussion of UDO Steering Committee Recommendations – Adam Culpepper, WithersRavenel
7. Adjournment of Nash County Planning Board – Chairman Dee Parker, Jr.
8. Adjournment of Board of County Commissioners – Chairman Marvin C. Arrington
